observe: Four things have to be true at once for this vault to trap you. All four, together, every time.
fault: Look around. All four are already here. This wasn't bad luck — it was inevitable the moment they lined up.
repair: Name them. Mutual exclusion, hold-and-wait, no preemption, circular wait.
escape: Confirm all four before the vault seals again.

observe: Deadlock requires four conditions: mutual exclusion, hold-and-wait, no preemption, circular wait.
fault: All four necessary conditions for deadlock are present.
repair: Identify each of the four conditions in the current state.
escape: Confirm all four conditions before time expires.

hints: Missing even one of the four conditions means deadlock cannot occur.
